creator: rea-fbsd@codelabs.ru
text:
Mastertickets plugin was updated for Trac 0.12: the entire 3.0.x line
supports only 0.12.  And Trac in FreeBSD ports was updated to 0.12, so
it is good to have the plugin that can really work with Trac 0.12 well.

Fix: 

I had updated the port to 3.0.1 and introduced the OPTIONS knob named
TRAC_11 that makes the plugin to be compiled for the Trac 0.11 if
someone is not yet ready to really move to 0.12.  0.11 variant of the
port still stays at 2.1.3, but the patch that allows the plugin to work
with PostgreSQL backend was added.

The patch is available at
  http://codelabs.ru/fbsd/ports/trac-mastertickets/update-to-3.0.1.diff
it was tested on our Trac instance that runs 0.12 from the ports.

It was also tested on the Tinderbox for 7.x/8.x/9.x and no package
building problems were found.
How-To-Repeat: 
Look at the http://github.com/coderanger/trac-mastertickets/commits/master
